strengths: Strong analytics stack (SQL, Python, Snowflake, BigQuery)
Dashboarding and automation (Power BI, Tableau, ETL)
Quantified impact (300% targeted revenue growth, 40% efficiency)
weaknesses: No mention of tagging implementation or Adobe Tag Manager
No explicit experience with MTA/DCO or AI marketing tools
No direct mention of running MBRs/QBRs or agency liaison
improvement_bullets: Spearheaded web analytics reporting initiatives, leveraging proficiency in platforms like Google Analytics and familiarity with Adobe Analytics/Tag Manager to translate raw data into actionable UX insights.
Managed the end-to-end UAT and quality assurance (QA) lifecycle for reporting dashboards, collaborating with agency partners to ensure rigorous data integrity and 3rd-party tagging compliance.
Facilitated Monthly and Quarterly Business Reviews (MBR/QBR) by synthesizing complex media campaign performance data into clear, strategic presentations for executive stakeholders.
Optimized cross-functional workflows by liaising with marketing and digital teams to implement tracking specifications, ensuring consistent data collection for media planning and buying initiatives.
Applied data-driven methodologies to support 'test and learn' programs, utilizing A/B testing and statistical analysis to inform website enhancements and content intelligence strategies.
cover_letter: Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the Senior Associate, Web Analytics opportunity with Pfizer. I am interested in this opportunity because of Pfizer’s commitment to utilizing cutting-edge digital intelligence to improve patient outcomes and global healthcare transparency. What interests me about working for Pfizer is its approach to data-driven innovation; the company’s dedication to pushing the boundaries of medical research through advanced analytics inspires me because I am passionate about applying technical precision to life-saving digital initiatives. I believe my expertise in high-impact data automation and my strong background in stakeholder collaboration would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached problems by focusing on building a 'single source of truth' that bridges the gap between raw data and executive strategy. In fact, at Shine Masters, I identified a need for more reliable reporting and developed new automated workflows using Power BI and Python, which replaced manual processes and reduced data mismatches by 40%. This transformation provided leadership with the consistent, high-quality data needed to inform a 300% increase in targeted segment revenue over 12 months. Ultimately, I know that the Senior Associate, Web Analytics role at Pfizer would allow me to bring my proficiency in web measurement and performance reporting to key initiatives in digital campaign optimization. Additionally, my role as a Data Analyst at Shine Masters enabled me to develop my cross-functional project management skills. During this time, I standardized organizational KPIs and data governance frameworks across cross-functional teams, ensuring that all stakeholders remained aligned on key performance metrics. This effort reduced report discrepancies and allowed the team to deliver faster, more reliable business recommendations. I’m excited by the opportunity to use my background in digital measurement and A/B testing in working on website optimization and content intelligence at Pfizer. I know that my technical fluency and analytical mindset align with what it takes to succeed at the Senior Associate, Web Analytics role. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Justin Miller
